ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samplings" (
  "sampling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling event */,
  "samp_no" INTEGER /* Sampling number for tracking */,
  "prn" TEXT /* PRN (Project Reference Number) associated with the sampling */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date when the sampling occurred */,
  "sampling_time" TEXT /* Time when the sampling occurred */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the sampling occurred */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the sampling */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "method_code" TEXT /* Method code used for sampling */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sampling took place */,
  "sampler_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sampler who conducted the sampling */,
  "sampling_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the sampling event */,
  "regulatory_requirement" TEXT /* Regulatory requirement being met by the sampling event */,
  "sampling_type" TEXT /* Type of sampling event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sampling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samplings_method_code FOREIGN KEY ("method_code") REFERENCES methods ("method_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samplings_sampler_id FOREIGN KEY ("sampler_id") REFERENCES samplers ("sampler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samplings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "easting" REAL /* Easting coordinate of the site */,
  "northing" REAL /* Northing coordinate of the site */,
  "catchment" TEXT /* Catchment area code */,
  "catchment_description" TEXT /* Description of the catchment area */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the site is located */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "sampling_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sampling event */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material being analyzed */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "det_code" INTEGER /* Detection code */,
  "det_name" TEXT /* Name of the detection analysis */,
  "det_short" TEXT /* Short name for the detection method */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for detection */,
  "det_units" TEXT /* Units in which the result is measured */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_det_code FOREIGN KEY ("det_code") REFERENCES detectors ("det_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sampling_id FOREIGN KEY ("sampling_id") REFERENCES samplings ("sampling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the method used */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method */,
  "method_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "detectors" (
  "det_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the detector used */,
  "det_name" TEXT /* Full name of the detector */,
  "det_short" TEXT /* Short name for the detector */,
  "det_units" TEXT /* Units in which the detector measures */,
  "detector_type" TEXT /* Type of detector */,
  "detector_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the detector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("det_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "samplers" (
  "sampler_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sampler */,
  "sampler_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampler */,
  "sampler_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the sampler's work */,
  "sampler_role" TEXT /* Role of the sampler */,
  "sampler_institution" TEXT /* Institution the sampler belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sampler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "sampling_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sampling event */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_reports_sampling_id FOREIGN KEY ("sampling_id") REFERENCES samplings ("sampling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for compliance entry */,
  "sampling_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sampling event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Compliance status */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding compliance actions */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_sampling_id FOREIGN KEY ("sampling_id") REFERENCES samplings ("sampling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES samplers ("sampler_id")
)
